items.title: Control Resonant is a sequel — and also a starting point

items.title: New York lawmakers pass one-year ban on new data centers
items.description: The New York State legislature passed a one-year moratorium on new large data centers, the first statewide ban of its kind if Democratic Governor Kathy Hochul signs it into law. items.title: What happens when your phone is confiscated at the airport
